description_long: This is a medium-sized, soft-sided handbag with a deep green body and a burgundy ruffled top closure. The front features a large, intricate floral embroidery in a golden beige thread, adding a touch of elegance and craftsmanship. The bag is cinched at the top with a beige drawstring, which serves as both the closure and the carrying straps, looping out from either side. The back of the bag is plain green, without any decoration or pattern. The overall shape is rounded and slightly bulging, suggesting it is designed to hold soft or flexible contents. The surface appears to be made of a smooth, possibly satin or faux leather material, giving it a subtle sheen.
description: A green, soft-sided handbag with a burgundy ruffled top, beige drawstring straps, and golden floral embroidery on the front. The back is plain green, and the bag has a rounded, cinched shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golden floral embroidery, beige drawstring straps, and burgundy ruffled top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bag's narrow profile and the looped drawstring strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green surface and the gathered top closure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a partial glimpse of the floral embroidery and drawstring loop.
attribute_strap_type: single drawstring strap, medium length, non-adjustable, attached at the top sides and used for both closure and carrying
attribute_closure_mechanism: drawstring closure at the top, cinched with beige cords
attribute_decorative_elements: golden floral embroidery on the front
attribute_pattern: floral embroidery on the front; otherwise solid color
